definitions: 俘虏；被囚禁的人；被控制或困住的人（也可作形容词：被俘的，被囚禁的）

examples.text: the Monkey King had finally been captured in a white-hot prison cell. But rather than cooking him to a crisp, the sweltering cage had inflamed its captive’s strength. Now he was free once more and itching for a fight. Desperate, the Jade Emperor called on the only being stronger than he,
examples.explanation: 这里的 captive 指被关在白热牢笼里的 Monkey King，也就是“被囚禁的人/俘虏”。句子说炎热的牢笼不但没有烧毁他，反而增强了这个囚徒的力量。

source.text: The tale of the Monkey King and the Buddha - Ji Hao
